prompt: Here's the DESCRIPTION of my package 'WeatherTools'. Can you review it against rOpenSci packaging standards and tell me what to fix? [DESCRIPTION with Depends: dplyr, RCurl, rjson; Author: Jane Doe (no Authors@R); Title: Tools for Weather Data in R; Description starts 'This package'; License: What license is it?]
assertions: Flags package name should be lowercase
Flags Title should drop 'in R' / be Title Case
